bull.t: Regulatory Progress: FDA Type C Feedback
bull.b: FDA feedback that CNM-Au8 data may support an accelerated-approval NDA is a structural milestone: it creates a plausible near-term regulatory pathway using a biomarker surrogate, enables a targeted NDA filing (planned Q3 2026), and shortens time-to-market relative to full approval routes.

Extending convertible note maturities and deferring monthly principal/interest materially reduces near-term cash outflows, improving liquidity flexibility. This structural relief gives management time to pursue regulatory milestones and fundraising without immediate debt-driven cash strain.

bull.t: Recent Equity Financing To Fund Development
bull.b: A $7M registered direct offering explicitly earmarked for NDA filing, Phase 3 preparation and manufacturing strengthens the company’s ability to advance late-stage development. This capital infusion is a tangible step to sustain program milestones and reduce immediate financing urgency.

bear.t: Minimal Revenue And Deep Operating Losses
bear.b: Revenue is negligible and declining while losses are substantial, reflecting a business model with no product sales and high R&D/operating costs. Persistently negative profitability limits reinvestment capacity and makes program continuity dependent on external funding and successful regulatory outcomes.

bear.t: Weakened Balance Sheet And Leverage Risk
bear.b: Negative equity combined with meaningful debt reduces financial flexibility and increases creditor leverage over outcomes. This balance sheet weakness raises refinancing and covenant risks, heightens dilution likelihood from future financings, and limits the company's strategic optionality.

bear.t: High Cash Burn And Limited Runway
bear.b: Persistent heavy cash burn versus a modest cash balance means the company will likely need additional financing within months. This structural cash-flow gap increases execution risk for development programs and raises the probability of dilutive financings or constrained operations before regulatory milestones are achi
